---
title: Vikraman Choudhury
image: photo.webp
about:
    template: solana
    links:
        - text: "{{< ai orcid >}} ORCiD"
          href: https://orcid.org/0000-0003-2030-8056
        - text: "{{< ai arxiv >}} arXiv"
          href: https://arxiv.org/a/choudhury_v_1
        - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google Scholar"
          href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=25q0yK8AAAAJ&hl=en
        - text: "{{< ai dblp >}} DBLP"
          href: https://dblp.org/pid/205/2352.html
        - text: "{{< fa brands github >}} GitHub"
          href: https://github.com/vikraman
        - text: "{{< ai mathoverflow >}} MathOverflow"
          href: https://mathoverflow.net/users/99623/vikraman
---

I am a Chancellor's Fellow (Lecturer) in Mathematically Structured Programming
at the University of Strathclyde, Glasgow, UK.

I study mathematical foundations of computation, through an algebraic lens.
My research spans category theory, type theory, programming language theory,
logic, semantics, concurrency, constructive mathematics, and formalisation.

### History

|              |                           |                                 |
|--------------|---------------------------|---------------------------------|
| 2025 -- ???  | University of Strathclyde | Chancellor's Fellow             |
| 2023 -- 2025 | Universitá di Bologna     | Marie Skłodowska-Curie Fellow   |
| 2021 -- 2023 | University of Glasgow     | Head of School's RA             |
| 2019 -- 2021 | University of Cambridge   | PhD student, Paul Purdom Fellow |
| 2015 -- 2022 | Indiana University        | MS/PhD student                  |
